item.title: Compounding Information for States
item.description: FDA collaborates with state officials in a variety of ways, including by sharing information about compounders who engage in poor practices that could put patients at risk, sharing information about complaints and adverse events, and sharing findings from inspections.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Fiscal Year 2026 Generic Drug Science and Research Initiatives Public Workshop - 06/08/2026
item.description: This workshop provides an overview of the status of science and research initiatives for generic drugs and an opportunity for public input on these initiatives. Learn more.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Recently Issued Guidance Documents
item.description: This page lists Recently Issued CBER and Cross-Center Guidance Documents.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Individual Case Safety Reports
item.description: This web page is dedicated to the health and regulatory data standard: Individual Case Safety Report
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Generic Drug Facilities, Sites and Organization Lists
item.description: Generic Drug Facilities, Sites and Organization Lists
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: GDUFA Type II API DMF Payment Receipts Report
item.description: GDUFA Type II API DMF Payment Receipts Report
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: C3TI Compass (Knowledge Repository)
item.description: Centralized knowledge repository for clinical trial innovation
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Real-World Evidence
item.description: Real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) played an increasing role in health care decisions. The 21st Century Cures Act, passed in 2016, placed additional focus on the use of these types of data to support regulatory decision making.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: CDER Drug Approvals that Used Real-World Evidence
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) uses real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) to support regulatory decision-making across the lifecycle of medical products, including premarket evaluation and postmarket monitoring of safety and effectiveness.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Notices of Updates
item.description: Webpage providing notices of updates to FDA's STIC webpages for antibacterial and antifungal drugs.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: M15 General Principles for Model-Informed Drug Development
item.description: M15 General Principles for Model-Informed Drug Development
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Drugs@FDA Data Files
item.description: Drugs@FDA Downloadable Data File in ZIP format, Data Definitions, and Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD)
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: FDA Accepts First In Silico Drug Development Tool Under ISTAND Program to Help Predict Drug-Induced Liver Injury
item.description: FDA Accepts First In Silico Drug Development Tool Under ISTAND Program to Help Predict Drug-Induced Liver Injury
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: FDA Use of Real-World Evidence in Regulatory Decision-Making
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) uses real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) to support regulatory decision-making across the lifecycle of medical products, including premarket evaluation and postmarket monitoring of safety and effectiveness.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: CDER Postmarketing Studies that Used Real-World Evidence
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) uses real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) to support regulatory decision-making across the lifecycle of medical products, including premarket evaluation and postmarket monitoring of safety and effectiveness.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Pulmonary Tuberculosis: Developing Drugs for Treatment
item.description: The purpose of this guidance is to assist sponsors in the clinical development of new antibacterial drugs for the treatment of pulmonary tuberculosis (TB).
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: What's New Related to Drugs
item.description: Want to know what's new on drugs from FDA? This page provides quick links to the latest on a variety of topics including: drug approvals, safety warnings, drug shortages, etc.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Innovative Science and Technology Approaches for New Drugs (ISTAND) Program
item.description: The Innovative Science and Technology Approaches for New Drugs (ISTAND) Pilot Program is designed to expand DDT types by encouraging development of DDTs that are out of scope for existing DDT qualification programs but may still be beneficial for drug development.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Drug Alerts and Statements
item.description: See updates from CDER on fast-moving issues and learn about CDER's work to enhance public health
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Section 804 Importation Program Policies and Authorizations
item.description: FDA has issued policies and taken actions to implement section 804 of the Federal Food, Drug and Cosmetic Act, which allows states and Indian tribes to import certain prescription drugs from Canada. Learn more.
item.dc:creator: FDA
